560.title: Voice of a Killer Special:...
560.description: Colonel Russell Williams is one of the deadliest murderers the UK has ever known. Yet, because he committed his crimes in Canada, few people have heard of him. This is his story.

561.title: Judge Judy
561.description: An ex-convict with children by two women is called to the stand to testify when they sue each other over slashed tyres and an alleged assault at a gas station.

562.title: Cheaters
562.description: Chuck's wife complains of needing more space and moves out - but is there another reason for her exit? Ann finds evidence of her boyfriend's infidelity in his car.

563.title: World's Most Evil Killers
563.description: Investigating the life and crimes of Richard Chase, also known as the Vampire of Sacramento.

564.title: Judge Judy
564.description: A woman sues her younger boyfriend for the balance on a vehicle that he totaled. Then, ex-lovers fight over custody, a car crash and an assault and a brother and sister want their late mother's money.

565.title: Judge Judy
565.description: Gamblers fight over slot machine winnings and a woman claims her truck was illegally repossessed. Then, two women accuse their roommate of stealing and not paying bills.

566.title: Judge Judy
566.description: Troubles with a vehicle divide a man and his fiancee's sister. Then, a co-worker sues a teen for rent and utilities.

567.title: Something's Killing Me
567.description: Jeanna Giese complains to her parents that she's fatigued and has numbness in her arm. Doctors speculate that it might be Lyme disease or West Nile, but what Jeanna has is far more sinister.

568.title: Operation Repo
568.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

569.title: Operation Repo
569.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

570.title: Judge Judy
570.description: A man says a woman assaulted him on their first date; a horse's new owner accuses the seller of false advertisement and stops paying.

571.title: Judge Judy
571.description: Two women sue their ex-boyfriends for repayment of loans.

572.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
572.description: Team Salvage is attempting to pull a damaged ship out of the mangrove jungle in one piece, as its owners are determined to keep it and repair it.

573.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
573.description: Dog faces his feelings about a past arrest that changed his life. Meanwhile, Beth attempts to stop the team from cursing and a look at the techniques of fugitive recovery.

574.title: Close Calls On Camera
574.description: A top British surfer rides the wave of his life, but then it all goes wrong. Also, two little girls call for help when their dad collapses, and a mum and daughter suddenly find their tumble dryer on fire.

575.title: Operation Repo
575.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

577.title: Paranormal Survivor
577.description: A man shares his story of a monster attack. The story of a couple who experienced violent paranormal activity. Holly shares her story of being haunted be her ex-husband's ghost.

578.title: Judge Judy
578.description: Ex-lovers' fight involves flying fish-tanks and a cinder block thrown through a window.

579.title: Judge Judy
579.description: An ex-roommate sues for illegal eviction, property damage and assault.

580.title: Judge Judy
580.description: A woman thinks she does not have to repay a friend for loans for clothes, rent and car insurance.

581.title: Operation Repo
581.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

582.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
582.description: Team Salvage is attempting to pull a damaged ship out of the mangrove jungle in one piece, as its owners are determined to keep it and repair it.

583.title: Something's Killing Me
583.description: Florida college student Lindsey Meyer and Michigan E.M.T Kevin Nesbit both come down with a painful sore throat. What seem like symptoms of a common cold, soon spiral into a life or death situation.

584.description: A top British surfer rides the wave of his life, but then it all goes wrong. Also, two little girls call for help when their dad collapses, and a mum and daughter suddenly find their tumble dryer on fire.

586.title: Judge Judy
586.description: Former friends feud, a partygoer accuses another of kicking a car.

587.title: Judge Judy
587.description: A woman sues her ex-flatmates for rent, and a woman sues her parents for the value of a car loan and unpaid personal loans.
